block_code: Blueprint block: rule missing — performance amendment required
block_detail: The hash-locked authority contains 64 positive-X angular divisions, which cannot satisfy the 10,000-triangle hard cap when replayed with the exact current R8 radius states. If that inherited count is superseded, the Step 11 blueprint provides no replacement angular subdivision rule.

pregeometry_performance_gate.minimum_rotational_triangle_formula: 206 transitions * 64 positive-X angular divisions * 2 triangles per quad * 2 whole-Rz180 occurrences

closed_world_decision.branch_if_64_divisions_remain_authoritat: blocked because the rotational topology alone exceeds the hard cap by at least 42,736 triangles
closed_world_decision.branch_if_64_divisions_are_superseded: blocked because no replacement angular division count or adaptive tessellation rule exists in the authoritative Step 11 blueprint

required_amendment.name: Step 11B angular tessellation and performance amendment
must_lock: the exact positive-X angular division count or deterministic adaptive rule
continuous proportional U ownership with no nearest-pixel skipping or repetition
the exact whole-asset triangle estimate before Blender
silhouette review expectations for the chosen full-circumference side count
required_amendment.recommended_measurement_only_candidate: Evaluate 6 and 8 positive-X angular divisions against exact whole-asset topology counts; do not build geometry until one exact rule is approved.
